_note: Each top-level key maps to a card type or game entity. Card generator templates select a type and render the fields within it. All id fields are kebab-case strings used for cross-referencing.

classes.name: Einherjar
classes.loreQuote: Stand firm, shield-brothers! The Einherjar do not yield!

classMechanic.name: Hold Ground
classMechanic.description: Gain Hold Ground tokens by staying in place. Lose all tokens on voluntary movement. More tokens = more power. Token states: 0 = Unrooted, 1 = Planted, 2 = Rooted, 3 = Immovable.

signature.name: Skjaldborg
signature.base: Once per turn, extend shield to one adjacent ally. That ally gains Shield 1 until start of Einherjar's next turn. Requires Planted (1+ tokens).
signature.level4: Shield extension now covers all adjacent allies simultaneously.
signature.level8: While Immovable (3 tokens), adjacent allies cannot be forcibly moved by any monster ability.

diceTable.name: Glancing Blow
diceTable.effect: Deal 1 damage AND gain 1 Hold Ground token.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: Half damage, no bonus.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage + Shield 1 until start of next turn.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage + push target 1 hex away + Shield 1.

diceTable.name: Critical Blow
diceTable.effect: Double damage, push 2 hexes, Shield 2 until next turn, gain 1 Fate Token.

classes.name: Valkyrie
classes.loreQuote: I choose the slain. I guide the worthy. I am the spear of judgment.

classMechanic.name: Verdict
classMechanic.description: One enemy at a time is Verdicted. Verdict Tokens track battle momentum. Verdicted enemies are prime targets for bonus damage and special effects.

signature.name: Wings of War
signature.base: Once per Act (not per turn), teleport to any hex within 4 hexes. If you land adjacent to the Verdicted enemy, deal 2 damage immediately. No attack roll.
signature.level4: Wings of War range increases to 6 hexes. Landing adjacent to any Verdicted or Condemned enemy triggers the damage.
signature.level8: Wings of War can now be used twice per Act. Second use deals 3 damage instead of 2 on landing.

diceTable.name: Glancing Blow
diceTable.effect: Deal 1 damage AND move 1 hex in any direction.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: Half damage, no bonus.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage, normal effects.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage + move 2 hexes OR teleport adjacent to any ally. Gain 1 Fate Token.

diceTable.name: Critical Blow
diceTable.effect: Triple damage, move 3 hexes, immediately attack again (new roll). Gain 2 Fate Tokens.

classes.name: Nidstang
classes.loreQuote: Your name is cursed. Your deeds are ash. The Níðstǫng stands, and you are nothing.

classMechanic.name: Curse Tokens
classMechanic.description: Place Curse Tokens on Monster Cards (max 3 per enemy). Each token degrades the monster's dice table results. Remove on monster defeat.

signature.name: Nídstǫng Pole
signature.base: Once per Act: erect a Curse Pole on any hex within 3 hexes. While the Pole stands, all enemies within 2 hexes of it start each Monster Phase with 1 Curse Token already applied. The Pole lasts until the Nidstang moves more than 5 hexes from it or the Act ends.
signature.level4: The Pole's aura extends to 3 hexes. Enemies entering the aura mid-round gain 1 Curse Token immediately.
signature.level8: The Pole now persists across Act transitions (until destroyed). Enemies ending their activation within the aura cannot spend or remove Curse Tokens.

diceTable.name: Cursed Whisper
diceTable.effect: Deal 1 damage. Place 1 Curse Token on target regardless of hit strength.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: Half damage. Target receives Wound condition.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage. Place 1 Curse Token on target.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage + place 2 Curse Tokens on target + Poison condition.

diceTable.name: Critical Blow
diceTable.effect: Double damage. Place 3 Curse Tokens on target. Target is Stunned until their next activation. Gain 1 Fate Token.

classes.name: Seiðr
classes.loreQuote: The threads of fate are mine to weave… and to sever.

classMechanic.name: Fate Threads
classMechanic.description: Weave Fate Threads onto allies (Protection) or enemies (Doom) or the board state (Reversal). Each thread type triggers different effects when activated.

signature.name: Völva's Trance
signature.base: Once per scenario: the Seiðr enters a trance until end of their next turn. During the trance, peek at the top 3 cards of the Saga Event deck and reorder them however you choose. Gain 2 Fate Tokens on return.
signature.level4: Trance now lets you peek at the full Saga Event deck. You may remove one card from the deck entirely this scenario (set aside face-down).
signature.level8: Trance can now be used twice per scenario. The second use also lets any one ally immediately remove all Exhaustion Tokens.

diceTable.name: Glancing Touch
diceTable.effect: Deal 1 damage OR heal 1 Health on one ally within 2 hexes.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: Half damage or half heal (round down), no bonus.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage or full heal. Place 1 Protection or Doom thread (your choice).

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: Full effect + grant one ally Advantage on their next roll. Gain 1 Fate Token.

diceTable.name: Critical Blow
diceTable.effect: Double effect, all allies within 3 hexes gain +1 on their next roll. Gain 2 Fate Tokens.

classes.name: Ulfhednar
classes.loreQuote: The wolf does not pity the lamb. I am the wolf.

classMechanic.name: Two-State System
classMechanic.description: Human state: measured, tactical. Wolf state: powerful but restricted — cannot use Bottom actions, no card selection at Act transitions. Switch with Rage Tokens. Wolf state forces specific AI-like behaviour.

states.label: Wolf — Top actions only, Speed 6, bonus damage

signature.name: Odin's Wolf
signature.base: Shift into Wolf state as a free action at the start of your turn (no card play needed). While in Wolf state, all TOP actions deal +2 damage. Cannot voluntarily return to Human state until Act transition.
signature.level4: Wolf state now grants immunity to Stun and Immobilize. Gain 1 Rage Token each time you deal damage while in Wolf state.
signature.level8: While in Wolf state with 3+ Rage Tokens, your attacks ignore Shield tokens and Armour effects. Rage Tokens carry across Act transitions (do not reset).

diceTable.name: Glancing Fang
diceTable.effect: Deal 1 damage. If in Wolf state, gain 1 Rage Token.

diceTable.name: Weak Bite
diceTable.effect: Half damage. If in Wolf state, push target 1 hex.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage. If in Wolf state, deal +1 bonus damage.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage + Wound condition. If in Wolf state, deal +2 bonus damage + 1 Rage Token.

diceTable.name: Savage Rend
diceTable.effect: Double damage, Wound + Poison. If in Wolf state, triple damage instead. Gain 2 Fate Tokens.

classes.name: Skald
classes.loreQuote: I sing of victory before it happens. My words make it true.

classMechanic.name: Song Track
classMechanic.description: A slider (1-5) on the Character Board. Advances when allies succeed. Powers Skald abilities — higher track = more powerful effects. Decays if the Skald fails to perform.

signature.name: Saga of Heroes
signature.base: Once per Act: declare a Saga Moment. Choose one ally within Song Range (4 hexes). Until the end of the Act, that ally's Strong Hits (15-19) trigger the Song Track to advance by 1 as a bonus. The Skald does not need to be in range when this triggers.
signature.level4: Saga Moment can now be declared on two allies simultaneously. Both allies benefit. Song Track advances for either qualifying.
signature.level8: When the Song Track reaches 5 during a Saga Moment, all allies within Song Range immediately gain 2 Fate Tokens and remove 2 Exhaustion Tokens. Song Track resets to 3.

diceTable.name: Off-Key
diceTable.effect: Deal 1 damage. Song Track -1 (minimum 1).

diceTable.name: Weak Verse
diceTable.effect: Half damage. No Song Track change.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: Full damage. If Song Track is 3+, one ally within Song Range removes 1 Exhaustion Token.

diceTable.name: Inspiring Blow
diceTable.effect: Full damage + Song Track +1 + one ally within Song Range gains Advantage on next attack.

diceTable.name: Legendary Blow
diceTable.effect: Double damage. Song Track advances to maximum (5). All allies in Song Range gain 1 Fate Token.

abilityCards.name: Plant Your Feet

top.action: Gain 2 Hold Ground tokens immediately.

bottom.action: Move up to 2 hexes.

abilityCards.designNote: Lowest initiative — the Einherjar always goes last, and is always exactly where they need to be.

top.action: Attack one adjacent enemy. On any hit, enemy is Stunned until their next activation.

bottom.action: Move up to 2 hexes and position between an ally and nearest enemy (lose all Hold Ground tokens).

top.action: Until start of next turn, the first attack against any adjacent ally is redirected to the Einherjar instead.

bottom.action: Remove 2 Exhaustion Tokens from any adjacent ally.

top.action: Attack one enemy within 2 hexes. If Rooted or Immovable (2-3 tokens), deal +3 additional damage.

bottom.action: Gain Immovable status until end of turn — cannot be forcibly moved by any monster ability this round.

top.action: Gain 3 Hold Ground tokens AND Shield 3 this round — pure defensive commitment.

bottom.action: Grant Shield 1 to all adjacent allies until start of your next turn.

abilityCards.name: Shield Bash

top.action: Attack one adjacent enemy — push them 2 hexes away.

bottom.action: Move up to 3 hexes without losing Hold Ground tokens this turn.

abilityCards.designNote: Shield Bash BOTTOM is the exception — the only card that allows movement without penalty.

top.action: Reactive — when an ally would be Incapacitated this round, immediately move to their hex and take the triggering hit instead.

bottom.action: Gain 1 Hold Ground token AND remove 1 Exhaustion Token from yourself.

abilityCards.name: Defy the Giant

top.action: Deal damage equal to 2× the number of Hold Ground tokens currently held (minimum 2). No attack roll needed.

bottom.action: All enemies adjacent to you must make a move action away from you — they cannot attack this Monster Phase activation.

abilityCards.designNote: High initiative — powerful Rest card (removes 7 Exhaustion).

top.action: Attack one enemy within 3 hexes. If Verdicted, this attack ignores Shield tokens.

bottom.action: Designate any enemy within 4 hexes as Verdicted.

top.action: Move up to 5 hexes, then attack one adjacent enemy. This movement does not trigger monster attacks of opportunity.

bottom.action: Teleport to any hex within 3 hexes. Gain 1 Verdict Token if you land adjacent to the Verdicted enemy.

top.action: All enemies adjacent to you must move 1 hex away — the Valkyrie's presence is overwhelming.

bottom.action: Designate a Verdicted enemy as Condemned — next attack against them by anyone deals +3 damage, then Condemned is removed.

top.action: Attack one enemy. If you moved at least 3 hexes this turn before attacking, deal +2 damage.

bottom.action: Move up to 3 hexes. If you pass within 1 hex of the Verdicted enemy, deal 1 damage to them automatically.

abilityCards.name: Valkyrjur's Call

top.action: Any ally within 3 hexes may immediately make one attack as a free action.

bottom.action: Gain 2 Verdict Tokens immediately.

abilityCards.designNote: Lowest initiative in the class. The TOP bonus ally attack gives the team an extra action at round start.

top.action: Attack one enemy. If this kills them, immediately make one bonus attack against any enemy within 2 hexes (one attack roll only — cannot chain).

bottom.action: Move up to 4 hexes. Each enemy within 1 hex of your path suffers 1 damage.

abilityCards.name: Battlefield Vision

top.action: Peek at the Scenario Sleeve's next unrevealed Act zone — read it silently, replace exactly as found, then share one thing you observed with the party.

bottom.action: Remove the current Verdict — gain 1 Verdict Token and 1 Fate Token.

abilityCards.designNote: TOP is the class's unique non-combat action. Genuine information advantage.

abilityCards.name: Into Valhalla

top.action: Attack the Verdicted enemy. If this kills them, each ally within 3 hexes immediately removes 2 Exhaustion Tokens.

bottom.action: Move up to 6 hexes. You may end this movement in a hex occupied by a monster — the monster is pushed 1 hex away.

abilityCards.designNote: Highest initiative — powerful Rest card (removes 9 Exhaustion).

top.action: Choose one ally within Song Range (4 hexes). Until their next turn, their Strong Hits (15-19) deal +2 bonus damage. Song Track +1 if any ally uses this bonus.

bottom.action: Move up to 3 hexes.

top.action: Choose one ally within Song Range. When that ally makes a Strong Hit (15-19) this round, they also gain 1 Fate Token.

bottom.action: Attack one adjacent enemy. On hit, the next ally to attack this monster gains Advantage.

abilityCards.name: Skaldic Taunt

top.action: Taunt one enemy within 4 hexes — that enemy uses CLOSEST targeting with the Skald as target this round (overriding normal AI).

bottom.action: Move up to 2 hexes. All allies within Song Range remove 1 Exhaustion Token.

abilityCards.designNote: Taunt draws fire onto the Skald — protecting allies by making herself the target.

abilityCards.name: War Cry

top.action: Reactive — when any ally within Song Range achieves a Critical Hit (20) this round, immediately declare War Cry: all other allies within Song Range gain Advantage on their next attack. Song Track +1.

bottom.action: Attack one enemy. If Song Track is 3+, deal bonus damage equal to Song Track value.

abilityCards.designNote: [SPECIAL] TOP can trigger mid-round separate from normal turn structure.

abilityCards.name: Immortalise the Deed

top.action: Choose one ally who achieved a Strong or Critical Hit this round — that ally gains 2 XP immediately. Song Track +2.

bottom.action: Skald and one adjacent ally swap positions. Neither loses tokens or conditions.

abilityCards.designNote: The XP grant is the most thematically authentic card in the game.

top.action: Choose one ally within Song Range. That ally may swap one currently selected card for any from their pool.

bottom.action: Remove all Exhaustion from one ally within Song Range. Song Track -1.

top.action: Choose one enemy. Until end of Act, that enemy rolls at Disadvantage when targeting any ally.

bottom.action: Gain 1 Fate Token for each ally within Song Range who made a Strong or Critical Hit this round.

abilityCards.name: The Last Verse

top.action: If any hero became Incapacitated this round, they immediately return to play with 2 Health and 1 Fate Token. Cannot be used if Act transition hand reset was suppressed.

bottom.action: Move up to 4 hexes. Song Track advances to 3 regardless of current value.

abilityCards.designNote: Highest initiative — powerful Rest card (removes 9 Exhaustion).

monsters.name: Draugr
monsters.lore: The dead walk when dishonored. The Draugr remembers life… and hates the living for it.

passives.name: Undying Grudge
passives.effect: When a Draugr is defeated, place 1 Exhaustion Token on the hero who dealt the killing blow.

specialAbility.name: Grave Chill
specialAbility.effect: On a Strong Hit or Critical, the target hero loses 1 Fate Token (discarded to the pool). If the hero has no Fate Tokens, they gain 1 Exhaustion Token instead.

diceTable.name: Miss
diceTable.effect: The Draugr's blow goes wide. No effect.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: 1 damage.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: 2 damage. Target gains 1 Exhaustion Token.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: 3 damage. Grave Chill triggers — target loses 1 Fate Token.

diceTable.name: Critical
diceTable.effect: 4 damage. Grave Chill triggers. Target is also Wounded.

monsters.name: Huldra
monsters.lore: Beautiful as spring, hollow as a rotting log. Do not follow her into the woods.

passives.name: Hollow Form
passives.effect: The Huldra cannot be targeted by abilities that require line-of-sight from behind (the hollow back cannot be exploited — she always faces you).

specialAbility.name: Lure
specialAbility.effect: On a Standard Hit or better, the target hero must spend 1 Fate Token or move 1 hex toward the Huldra at the end of their next turn (compelled movement, ignores own movement rules).

diceTable.name: Miss
diceTable.effect: No effect.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: 2 damage.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: 2 damage. Lure triggers.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: 3 damage. Lure triggers. Target also gains Muddle condition.

diceTable.name: Critical
diceTable.effect: 4 damage. Lure triggers. Target is Muddled and Immobilized until their next turn.

monsters.name: Nøkken
monsters.lore: He plays most beautifully when someone is about to drown.

passives.name: Enchanted Melody
passives.effect: At the start of each Monster Phase, all heroes within 3 hexes of the Nøkken must spend 1 Fate Token or suffer Muddle until their next activation.

specialAbility.name: Drowning Song
specialAbility.effect: On a Critical Hit, the target hero is Immobilized and gains 2 Exhaustion Tokens as the song's pull overwhelms them.

diceTable.name: Miss
diceTable.effect: The music falters. No effect.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: 2 damage. Target gains Muddle.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: 3 damage. Target gains Muddle.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: 4 damage. Target gains Muddle + 1 Exhaustion Token.

diceTable.name: Critical
diceTable.effect: 5 damage. Drowning Song triggers — Immobilized + 2 Exhaustion Tokens.

monsters.name: Troll
monsters.lore: Trolls turn to stone in sunlight. Until then, they are strong enough to crush a horse.

passives.name: Stone Hide
passives.effect: The Troll has permanent Shield 1 against all ranged attacks.

passives.name: Sunlight Weakness
passives.effect: If the active Scenario Sleeve has a Daylight icon in Zone 6, the Troll rolls at Disadvantage on all attacks.

specialAbility.name: Boulder Hurl
specialAbility.effect: On a Strong Hit, the Troll hurls a boulder instead of striking — targets a hero up to 4 hexes away. That hero is pushed 2 hexes and adjacent heroes to the landing point take 1 damage each.

diceTable.name: Miss
diceTable.effect: No effect.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: 3 damage.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: 5 damage. Target is pushed 1 hex.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: Boulder Hurl — target up to 4 hexes, pushed 2 hexes, adjacent heroes take 1 damage.

diceTable.name: Critical
diceTable.effect: 6 damage + push 2 hexes. All heroes adjacent to target take 2 damage (ground shockwave).

monsters.name: Frost Giant
monsters.lore: The jotnar do not raid for gold. They raid to remind us we are small.

passives.name: Towering Presence
passives.effect: Heroes adjacent to the Frost Giant at the start of their turn must spend 1 Fate Token or suffer 1 Exhaustion Token (the sheer scale is overwhelming).

specialAbility.name: Freezing Grasp
specialAbility.effect: On a Critical Hit, the target hero is Immobilized (cannot move) until another hero uses a full action to break them free. The Frozen hero can still attack, but only targets within 1 hex.

bossThreshold.note: Boss threshold behaviour is defined entirely on the Scenario Sleeve. This card carries no threshold text. See scenario.bossThresholds.

diceTable.name: Miss
diceTable.effect: No effect. The giant's blow misses by a margin that would decapitate a smaller target.

diceTable.name: Weak Hit
diceTable.effect: 4 damage.

diceTable.name: Standard Hit
diceTable.effect: 6 damage. Target gains 2 Exhaustion Tokens.

diceTable.name: Strong Hit
diceTable.effect: 8 damage. Target is pushed 3 hexes. Heroes in the path take 2 damage each.

diceTable.name: Critical
diceTable.effect: 10 damage. Freezing Grasp triggers — Immobilized until freed.

equipment.name: Runed Blade
equipment.effect: Once per round, after rolling your attack, you may spend 1 Fate Token to reroll one die before consulting the Dice Table.
equipment.flavour: Inscribed with the names of enemies yet to fall.

equipment.name: Spear of Precision
equipment.effect: Attacks with this weapon can target enemies up to 3 hexes away (ranged melee). Close-range attacks (adjacent) deal +1 damage.
equipment.flavour: Balanced for both the battlefield and the hunt.

equipment.name: Iron Shield
equipment.effect: Gain Shield 1 at the start of each Act. This shield stacks with ability-granted shields.
equipment.flavour: Heavy. Reassuring. Still warm from the forge.

equipment.name: Wolf Pelt
equipment.effect: You are immune to the Muddle condition. When you remove 2 or more Exhaustion Tokens in a single action, gain 1 Fate Token.
equipment.flavour: The wolf ran with the pack. You do not.

equipment.name: Rune-Carved Pendant
equipment.effect: Once per scenario, when you would be Incapacitated, instead remain at 1 Health. The pendant shatters — this equipment is then discarded.
equipment.flavour: It saved its last bearer too. Someone carved that name on the back.

equipment.name: Healing Draught
equipment.effect: Restore 3 Health. Use once during any session. Discard after use.

equipment.name: Mead of Courage
equipment.effect: Gain 2 Fate Tokens immediately. Use once during any session. Discard after use.
equipment.flavour: The gods drink this before Ragnarök. So can you.

equipment.name: Rune Salve
equipment.effect: Remove all Exhaustion Tokens from yourself. Use once during any session. Discard after use.
equipment.flavour: Smells of pine resin and something older.

sagaEvents.sagaLine: Odin watches from the high seat. His ravens have already reported your deeds.
sagaEvents.immediateEffect: The hero with the most Fate Tokens gains 2 additional Fate Tokens. If tied, all tied heroes gain 1.
sagaEvents.echo: For the remainder of this scenario, Strong Hits (15-19) by any hero generate an additional Fate Token.

sagaEvents.sagaLine: Thor's hammer echoes in the distance. Something draws his attention here.
sagaEvents.immediateEffect: One enemy of your choice is immediately Stunned until end of their next activation.
sagaEvents.echo: Once per round for the rest of this Act, any hero who rolls a 20 may immediately remove 2 Exhaustion Tokens.

sagaEvents.sagaLine: The mountains tremble. The giants have noticed you.
sagaEvents.immediateEffect: Each hero gains 2 Exhaustion Tokens. The monster with the lowest current Health is removed and replaced with a new instance of the same monster at full Health.
sagaEvents.echo: For the remainder of this Act, all Standard Hits (7-14) by monsters deal +1 bonus damage.

sagaEvents.sagaLine: A shadow falls across the battlefield that has no source.
sagaEvents.immediateEffect: All heroes must discard 1 Fate Token (discarded to the pool). Heroes with no Fate Tokens gain 1 Exhaustion Token instead.
sagaEvents.echo: Enemies gain +1 to their attack roll for the remainder of this round only.

sagaEvents.sagaLine: The World Tree shifts. A branch breaks. Somewhere, something changes.
sagaEvents.immediateEffect: Reveal the next unrevealed Act zone on the Scenario Sleeve early. The party may adjust card selections immediately if a hand reset is currently available.
sagaEvents.echo: The party may look at one Legacy Card spine slot that has not yet been earned — the won side only. Replace it exactly as found.

sagaEvents.sagaLine: A thread of fate runs between two of your number. When one acts, the other feels it.
sagaEvents.immediateEffect: Choose two heroes. Until end of Act: when either gains a Fate Token, the other gains 1 as well.
sagaEvents.echo: The linked pair may, once this Act, swap positions as a free action (no card play needed). Both heroes must agree.

legacyCards.won: The dead are at rest. Heroes begin each session with 1 bonus Fate Token.
legacyCards.lost: The Draugr's curse lingers. All heroes start Act 1 with 1 Exhaustion Token.
legacyCards.constraintNote: 15-word maximum per side. Both sides above comply.

legacyCards.won: The Nine Realms remember your name. Strong Hits grant 1 bonus Fate Token this campaign.
legacyCards.lost: The darkness grows. Monsters gain +1 damage on Strong Hits for this campaign.
legacyCards.constraintNote: 15-word maximum per side. Both sides above comply.

zone1.flavourText: The burial mounds stretch to the horizon. Something stirs beneath the frost.

zone2.mapLayout: TODO — hex layout, starting positions, spawn hexes, objective markers

zone3.victorious: The barrow entrance is clear. The dead have retreated — for now.
zone3.besieged: The dead rise faster than expected. You push forward but pay a cost.

zone4.victorious: The barrow lord's seal is broken. The Draugr fall still.
zone4.besieged: The seal resists you. The Draugr multiply.

zone5.winText: The barrow is sealed. The dead rest. A Legacy Card is earned.
zone5.lossText: The barrow holds. You retreat into the night, cursed and exhausted.
zone5.consolationReward: Each hero gains 1 Loot Token. The active Realm Legacy Card is placed on its lost side.

zone6.specialRules: TODO — define any scenario-specific rules (e.g. daylight tracker, environmental effects)

act1to2Transition.transitionText: The barrow gate opens. The air changes.

act2to3Transition.transitionText: One final push. The dawn approaches.

objectives.description: Defeat all enemies on the map before round limit expires.
objectives.mechanicalFlow: Count enemies remaining. Trigger Act transition when 0 enemies remain.

objectives.description: One hero must reach the barrow entrance hex and spend a full action to seal it.
objectives.mechanicalFlow: Hero must end movement on objective hex and play any card for its TOP action (representing the sealing ritual). Cannot attack same turn.
